DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT CARLTON HOTEL PROPERTIES, JOIE DE VIVRE HOSPITALITY, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the causes of action for battery, IIED and concealment is overruled, all elements of these causes of action are sufficiently alleged, including intent. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of warranty of habitability is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to cite any authority for the proposition that implied or statutory breach of warranty of habitability is applicable to innkeeper-guest relationship. Plaintiff shall have leave to allege a cause of action under Health and Safety Code and/or California Code of Regulations independent from violation of CC 1941.
Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of warranty of quiet enjoyment is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff shall have leave to allege a cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing. Judge: Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS CARLTON HOTEL PROPERTIES and JOIE DE VIVRE HOSPITALITY, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to August 4, 2021. No later than July 2, 2021 Plaintiff to file a supplemental brief limited to citations to cases where liability for breach of warranty of habitability and breach of warranty of quiet enjoyment arose out of innkeeper-hotel guest relationship. No further argument allowed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
